name: Curious AI
tagline: Deep learning for real-time computer vision and autonomous systems
description: Finnish AI lab specializing in computer vision for robotics was acqui-hired by Apple in 2020. All web presence was scrubbed and the company ceased to exist.
story: Founded in Helsinki in 2015, Curious AI developed deep learning technology for real-time computer vision, with applications in robotics and autonomous systems. The company attracted investment from DCVC and built a research team working at the intersection of machine learning and physical-world AI. In October 2020, Apple quietly acquired Curious AI. True to Apple's playbook, the acquisition was followed by the complete removal of Curious AI's web presence — website taken down, social media accounts deleted, publications removed. The team was absorbed into Apple's sprawling AI division, and whatever technology Curious AI had built now lives somewhere inside Apple's products, invisible and unattributed.
